planner_feedback.message: CB-002 mandatory full method body rule violated. JcaCipherService.encrypt() window must be expanded to lines 80-300. Planner should always include full method bodies for files where IvParameterSpec/SecureRandom keywords appear in import block.

CB-004 truncated at line 60. Argon2Hash default parameter constants (DEFAULT_MEMORY, DEFAULT_ITERATIONS, DEFAULT_PARALLELISM) are security-critical and must be captured. Planner should extend KDF class reads to full class body.
BlowfishCipherService caller not found in grep hits. Planner should include reverse call graph results for weak/legacy cipher classes to confirm active vs dead code status.
PaddingScheme enum body not deep-read. Planner should always include full enum bodies for cipher mode/padding enums — these are security-critical.
JdbcRealm doGetAuthenticationInfo() body missing. Credential realm classes must have full authentication method bodies in context bundles.

7 confirmed not_crypto records (MapCache, WildcardPermission, EventBus, DefaultSessionKey, BearerToken, PermissionUtils, CodeQL workflow). Consider adding these file path patterns to an exclusion list: cache/*.java (generic key/value), authz/permission/*.java ('sign' permission vocab), session/mgt/*Key.java (session identifiers).
